productDisplayName: Flying Machine Women Blue Denim Shorts
description: Style Note Look cool and casual in this fashionable pair of shorts from flying machine. The well worn and well fitted look gives you unparalleled style. Team it with tees and canvas shoes for that chilled out and cool look.Product Details Washed blue denim shorts, has two insert pockets in front, one coin pocket inside the left insert pocket, button and zipped closure, two pockets at the back, waistband with loops for the belt and a brand patch on the back of the waistband Material Care 98% cotton and 2% lycra Machine wash cold Do not tumble dry Do not dry in direct sunlight Use warm iron, do not iron on print Size and Fit Slim fit, low riseThe model (height 6'and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
